rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §38.228, which governs joint rulemaking by education and HHSC commissioners on mental health resources. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Except as otherwise provided by this subchapter, the commissioner of education and the executive commissioner of the Health and Human Services Commission shall jointly adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns mental health resources rulemaking, not property tax exemptions.
